data.title: Eric Jackson Is Short Salesforce And Other Software Stocks: Inside 'AI Paradox' Market Hack
data.description: Renowned hedge fund manager Eric Jackson, famous for his optimistic outlook on Opendoor Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN), has shifted to a pessimistic view on SaaS (Software as a Service) stocks. He has taken short positions on leading names like Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM), Asana Inc. (NYSE: ASAN), Five9 Inc. (NASDAQ: FIVN), DocuSign Inc. (NASDAQ: DOCU), and Atlassian Corp. (NASDAQ: TEAM), which were once synonymous with the cloud computing surge. Jackson's bearish stance is based on what he terms the "AI Paradox." Through an analysis of 716 corporate earnings transcripts, Jackson identified a consistent trend: companies heavily emphasizing artificial intelligence tend to underperform their peers by an average of 5.4% in future stock returns. This revelation has influenced his current investment strategy. NVDA stock is experiencing upward momentum. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CUMMING GROUP LAUNCHES GLOBAL ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES DIVISION TO SUPPORT GROWTH IN HIGH-TECH CONSTRUCTION MARKETS
data.description: On March 31, 2026, a prominent company named Cumming Group, known as the top independent provider of project and cost management advisory services in North America with a leading position in Europe, revealed the launch of its global Advanced Technologies division. This move aims to enhance its capabilities in the industry.

data.title: Old National Bancorp Announces Schedule for First-Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Old National Bancorp, the parent company of Old National Bank and listed as (NASDAQ: ONB), disclosed its first-quarter earnings release and conference call timetable on March 31, 2026. The conference call is set to provide an in-depth review of the financial performance and will be a crucial event for investors and analysts. This announcement signifies a significant milestone for Old National as it showcases its commitment to transparency and timely reporting. Investors are advised to mark their calendars for this essential event to stay informed about the company's financial health and future outlook.

data.title: Investview, Inc. releases 2025 financials, operational highlights, and CEO message without revealing the source.
data.description: A recent announcement highlighted the impact of the rise in inflation rates, with an increase of 4.9% recorded in September compared to the previous year. This surge represents the largest jump seen in the past decade, largely driven by hikes in food and energy prices. In response, various sectors have been implementing strategies to navigate the challenges posed by these developments. Additionally, the country's GDP growth for the second quarter stood at 6.7%, marking a significant improvement from the previous quarter. This growth has been attributed to various government stimulus measures, along with increased consumer spending. Experts predict continued economic expansion in the upcoming months, albeit at a slightly slower pace.

data.title: Churchill Stateside Group Provides $900,000 Interim Bridge Loan for Orchard Village in Detroit, Michigan
data.description: Churchill Stateside Group (CSG) has recently finalized a $900,000 interim bridge loan for Orchard Village, an affordable family housing complex in Detroit, Michigan consisting of 48 units. The loan was facilitated by CSG affiliate Churchill Mortgage Construction LLC (CMC) to aid in transitioning to permanent financing under the HUD Section 223(f) loan program. Orchard Village, a recently built LIHTC apartment community, was the recipient of this financial support from CSG.

data.title: Keller Williams Names Jason Abrams Chief Industry & Strategy Officer
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Keller Williams is enhancing their education program with impactful projects. This ongoing effort by Abrams aims to further develop KW's education platform, showing a commitment to growth and innovation. This initiative underscores Keller Williams' dedication to empowering their agents with valuable knowledge and skills.

data.title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Canada Inc. Launches Men's GLN-Minoxidil 5% w/w Topical Aerosol Foam in Canadian Retail
data.description: Concord, Ontario - On March 31, 2026, Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Canada Inc. unveiled the introduction of Men's GLN-Minoxidil 5% w/w (50 mg/g) Topical Aerosol Foam in Canada. This addition to their OTC portfolio offers an affordable hair regrowth solution for men. This move serves to enhance their product range and cater to the growing demand for such products in the Canadian market.

data.title: City College of San Francisco Expands Basic Needs Support Through Strategic Partnership with Uwill
data.description: City College of San Francisco (CCSF) has partnered with Uwill to launch the SparkPoint CCSF Basic Needs Center, aiming to support students facing food insecurity, housing instability, and transportation issues after hours. The collaboration, initiated on March 31, 2026, will offer vital assistance to students at CCSF.

data.title: MedReview Announces Acquisition of Vital Data Technology
data.description: On March 31, 2026, MedReview, a prominent company specializing in payment integrity solutions for health insurers, made a significant announcement. They proudly revealed their acquisition of Vital Data Technology, a leading provider of advanced healthcare payer workflow and data technology. This acquisition marks a strategic move by MedReview to enhance their services and offerings in the industry.

data.title: Lattice Acquires Mandala Technology, Advancing the New Way to Work with People + AI
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in San Francisco, Lattice revealed that Founder Tarun Galagali has joined the team to enhance the company's intelligent people platform. Lattice, known for fostering success between individuals and AI, confirmed the acquisition of Mandala's AI-native technology. This strategic move aims to bolster Lattice's capabilities in this field.

data.title: Resecurity Introduces Native Integration with Splunk
data.description: A cybersecurity and threat intelligence company, Resecurity (USA), known for working with Fortune 100 enterprises and government agencies, has recently unveiled a new integration with Splunk. Through a specially designed app available on Splunkbase, organizations can now easily link Resecurity’s cyber threat intelligence with the broader Splunk ecosystem. This integration allows for the swift intake of indicators of compromise, benefitting companies of all sizes.

data.title: FMI Expands Consulting Capabilities with Launch of Energy & Power Team and Addition of Senior Leaders
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Raleigh, North Carolina, a prominent consulting and investment banking company, FMI Corporation, disclosed the incorporation of its consulting services into the energy and power industry. This expansion includes the recruitment of senior leaders like Evan. FMI Corporation is widely recognized for its services in the built environment and aims to bring its expertise to the energy and power sector. This strategic move is expected to significantly impact the company's operations and signifies its commitment to diversifying its consulting portfolio.

data.title: Series by Marriott Debuts in Japan with the Opening of Sugata Hotel Osaka Shinsaibashi
data.description: In Osaka, Japan, a new 256-room hotel has been launched, focusing on providing a unique blend of local charm and global connectivity for travelers. The hotel is designed to cater to curious individuals looking for authentic experiences. This property is part of the Series by Marriott brand and is included in Marriott Bonvoy's extensive collection of more than 30 exceptional hotels worldwide. The location aims to offer a distinctive hospitality experience to guests in the region, emphasizing a strong connection to the local culture while still maintaining international standards. The hotel is expected to attract a diverse range of guests seeking a balance between regional roots and global amenities.

data.title: Mercy Expands Primary Care Network with New Community Physician site in Westminster
data.description: Mercy Health Services has recently launched Mercy Personal Physicians at Westminster in Westminster, Maryland on March 31, 2026. This initiative is in line with their commitment to extending the 150-year legacy of the Sisters of Mercy in providing top-notch healthcare services. The establishment of this facility was commemorated through a dedicated ceremony, marking a significant milestone in the organization's mission to broaden access to quality healthcare.
